apiVersion: cluster.open-cluster-management.io/v1beta1
kind: Placement
metadata:
  name: placement-worker02-522c06a0
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  numberOfClusters: 1
  predicates:
    - requiredClusterSelector:
        labelSelector:
          matchLabels:
            cluster-name: worker02
---
apiVersion: cluster.open-cluster-management.io/v1beta1
kind: Placement
metadata:
  name: placement-worker01-522c06a0
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  numberOfClusters: 1
  predicates:
    - requiredClusterSelector:
        labelSelector:
          matchLabels:
            cluster-name: worker01
---
apiVersion: policy.open-cluster-management.io/v1
kind: PlacementBinding
metadata:
  name: binding-worker02-522c06a0
  namespace: my-namespace
placementRef:
  name: placement-worker02-522c06a0
  kind: Placement
  apiGroup: cluster.open-cluster-management.io/v1beta1
subjects:
- name: policy-enable-mig-worker02
  kind: Policy
  apiGroup: policy.open-cluster-management.io/v1
---
apiVersion: policy.open-cluster-management.io/v1
kind: PlacementBinding
metadata:
  name: binding-worker01-522c06a0
  namespace: my-namespace
placementRef:
  name: placement-worker01-522c06a0
  kind: Placement
  apiGroup: cluster.open-cluster-management.io/v1beta1
subjects:
- name: policy-enable-mig-worker01
  kind: Policy
  apiGroup: policy.open-cluster-management.io/v1
---
apiVersion: cluster.open-cluster-management.io/v1beta1
kind: Placement
metadata:
  name: app01-placement
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  numberOfClusters: 1
  predicates:
    - requiredClusterSelector:
        labelSelector:
          matchLabels:
            cluster-name: worker02
        claimSelector:
          matchExpressions:
            - key: compliance
              operator: In
              values:
                - "true"
